questions.question: What are even numbers?
questions.explanation: Even numbers leave a remainder of 0 when divided by 2.

questions.question: What are odd numbers?
questions.correct_answer: Numbers that are not divisible by 2
questions.explanation: Odd numbers leave a remainder of 1 when divided by 2.

questions.question: What happens when two even numbers are added?
questions.explanation: Adding multiples of 2 always gives another multiple of 2.

questions.question: What happens when two odd numbers are added?
questions.explanation: Odd numbers can be written as 2n + 1, and their sum becomes even.

questions.question: What happens when an even number is added to an odd number?
questions.explanation: Adding an even number does not change the odd nature of the number.

questions.question: What is a multiple of a number?
questions.correct_answer: A number obtained by multiplying the given number by an integer
questions.explanation: For example, multiples of 3 are 3, 6, 9, 12 and so on.

questions.question: What is a factor of a number?
questions.correct_answer: A number that divides another number exactly
questions.explanation: For example, factors of 12 include 1, 2, 3, 4, 6 and 12.

questions.question: What does 'always true' mean in mathematics?
questions.correct_answer: A statement that is true for all possible values
questions.explanation: It holds true regardless of the numbers chosen.

questions.question: What does 'sometimes true' mean?
questions.correct_answer: A statement that is true for some values but not for all
questions.explanation: The truth of the statement depends on the numbers used.

questions.question: What does 'never true' mean?
questions.correct_answer: A statement that is false for all possible values
questions.explanation: No example exists that makes the statement true.

notes.title: Even Numbers
notes.content: Even numbers are integers that are divisible by 2 and can be written in the form 2n.

notes.title: Odd Numbers
notes.content: Odd numbers are integers that leave a remainder of 1 when divided by 2 and can be written as 2n + 1.

notes.title: Factors and Multiples
notes.content: Factors divide a number exactly, while multiples are obtained by multiplying a number with integers.

notes.title: Mathematical Statements
notes.content: Statements in mathematics can be classified as always true, sometimes true or never true.

notes.title: Parity
notes.content: Parity refers to whether a number is even or odd.

facts.fact: The sum of two even numbers is always even.
The sum of two odd numbers is always even.
The product of two odd numbers is always odd.
Zero is an even number because it is divisible by 2.
